name: alert_road_setback_violation
description: Fire when a residential building is created within 250 m of a structural road (importance 1-2: motorways + national roads) - urban planning setback rule (Code de l'urbanisme L111-6: 75 m motorway / 25 m main road; demo widens to 250 m so the alert reads at city zoom).

config.message: Residential building within 250 m of a structural road (importance 1-2) - check L111-6 setback rule
ALERT URBA: nouveau bati residentiel a moins de 250 m d'un axe structurant (autoroute ou nationale) a Clermont-Ferrand. Verifier recul reglementaire (Code urba L111-6).
